'''jasoyo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:ignote|ignote]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-s-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:ignote|ignote]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| jasoyo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:jæseyeth|jæseyeth]] || [[word:jæseyej|jæseyej]] || [[word:jæseyesh|jæseyesh]] || [[word:jæseye|jæseye]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:jasosoyoth|jasosoyoth]] || [[word:jasosoyoj|jasosoyoj]] || [[word:jasosoyosh|jasosoyosh]] || [[word:jasosoyo|jasosoyo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:jasoyoth|jasoyoth]] || [[word:jasoyoj|jasoyoj]] || [[word:jasoyosh|jasoyosh]] || [[word:jasoyo|jasoyo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:jasofyoth|jasofyoth]] || [[word:jasofyoj|jasofyoj]] || [[word:jasofyosh|jasofyosh]] || [[word:jasofyof|jasofyof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:jasoyotho|jasoyotho]] || [[word:jasoyojo|jasoyojo]] || [[word:jasoyosho|jasoyosho]] || [[word:jasoyoko|jasoyoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:jasoyoth|jasoyoth]] || [[word:jasoyoj|jasoyoj]] || [[word:jasoyosh|jasoyosh]] || [[word:jasoyo|jasoyo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:jasoyothol|jasoyothol]] || [[word:jasoyojol|jasoyojol]] || [[word:jasoyoshol|jasoyoshol]] || [[word:jasoyokol|jasoyokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:jasoyothotho|jasoyothotho]] || [[word:jasoyojojo|jasoyojojo]] || [[word:jasoyoshosho|jasoyoshosho]] || [[word:jasoyoko|jasoyoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:jasoyothon|jasoyothon]] || [[word:jasoyojon|jasoyojon]] || [[word:jasoyoshon|jasoyoshon]] || [[word:jasoyokon|jasoyokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:jasoyothoro|jasoyothoro]] || [[word:jasoyojoro|jasoyojoro]] || [[word:jasoyoshoro|jasoyoshoro]] || [[word:jasoyokoro|jasoyokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|7318718}}
